task: address_in_network in utils.py does manual bit-twiddling with struct and socket. Modernise it to use the standard library ipaddress module.
correctness_argument: `strict=False` tells `ip_network` to mask off host bits instead of raising ValueError. Common NO_PROXY values like '192.168.1.1/24' (host bits set) are handled identically to the original struct-based implementation, and proxy-bypass evaluation cannot crash.
